tracks.rawText: 3:47Untitled Projectv5.5Epic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotionalPublishRemix
tracks.title: Untitled Project

tracks.rawText: 3:18Untitled Projectv5.5Mystical electronic track with deep ambient textures and sensual heartbeat groove, Hypnotic rhythm blending tribal percussion and slow pulsing bass, fused with ethereal Gregorian-style choir and oriental vocal chants, Reverb-rich synths and cinematic pads create a spiritual yet erotic atmosphere — the sound of awakening between desire and transcendence, BPM 108, key A minor, Style of Suleymer’s Mystique, but with the primal groove of life itselfPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:55segment_022v5.5CoverFunk-rock fusion, A clean electric guitar plays a syncopated, percussive riff using 16th-note scratches and palm-muted staccato chords, The electric bass follows a slap technique, emphasizing the downbeat with a heavy thumb strike followed by rhythmic pops, A drum kit maintains a tight groove with a crisp, high-tuned snare and a dry kick drum, A bright, brassy synthesizer lead plays a short, repetitive melodic hook with a fast decay, The tempo is 115 BPM in 4/4 time, key of E minorPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:12Studio Selectionv5.5CoverElectrohouse at 128 BPM with punchy sidechained 4-on-the-floor kicks, crisp clap on 2 and 4, rolling offbeat open hats, and a rubbery sawtooth bass, Filtered supersaw chords, syncopated synth stabs, pitched risers, white-noise fills, and tight parallel compression create a polished club mix with bright, driving energyPublishRemix
